description_long: This is a two-story hostel building with a dark wood-paneled exterior and a large, angular, light gray roof. The structure is surrounded by a fenced yard featuring green grass, mature trees, outdoor seating, and a small playground with a playhouse and swings. The front facade has a central entrance with a double door and a small overhang, flanked by symmetrically arranged rectangular windows. The yard includes communal amenities such as picnic tables, benches, and a covered patio area, suggesting a social and recreational environment. The building's windows are large and evenly spaced, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, two-story hostel with a dark wood exterior, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring trees, outdoor seating, and a playground.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, fenced yard, trees, outdoor seating, and a covered patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the playground with a playhouse and swings, as well as the expanse of the yard and fence.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back facade with more windows and the central entrance, minimal yard features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the playground, trees, and the side of the building with evenly spaced windows.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located on the front facade, featuring a double door with a rectangular shape and a small overhanging canopy. The doors appear to be made of wood with glass panels, and the entrance is accessible directly from the yard without visible steps or ramps.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are large, rectangular, and symmetrically arranged on both floors of all visible facades. Each floor has a row of evenly spaced windows, with no decorative frames or shutters, contributing to a clean and modern appearance.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with modern influences, characterized by clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and functional outdoor spaces.
